creator: dave@ci.com.au
text:
Created attachment 184062
Log from poudriere build

rust-1.18.0 fails to build using bundled llvm on FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p19 and 11.0-RELEASE-p2 .

I have worked around the problem by setting the build option to not use the bundled llvm.  rust then builds against llvm40 successfully.
